msg: Control flow of non-void function ends here!
reasoning: Lines 18-20 are inside main() — the omap_h4_map_io() call and closing brace. The tool reports 'control flow of non-void function ends here' for main() under def(CONFIG_MACH_OMAP_H4). Two problems: (1) In C99+, main() implicitly returns 0 — not a bug. (2) main() lacks an explicit return regardless of CONFIG_MACH_OMAP_H4, so the presence condition is wrong. Same pattern as FAMILY_18/19. The vbdb-documented bug (6515e48) is an UndefinedSymbol (MACH_OMAP_H4 && !ARCH_OMAP2420: omap2_set_globals_242x is undefined). False positive.
